description: Toggleable projected tool matrix that forms an advanced multifunction toolkit in your hands while active.

The QSR-0P quantum reactor is an experimental chassis-integrated power source with infinite runtime. A controlled quantum substrate feeds a perpetual generator loop, supplying your bionic grid without conventional fuel handling.
A cosmetic pair of synthetic fox ears mounted to the head. The external audio fins provide light impact protection and a small perception boost.
A cosmetic articulated fox tail mounted to the lower torso. Mostly decorative, but the support frame gives a small amount of rear torso protection.

The QBM-7 Quantum Battery Matrix is a next-generation energy storage array integrated directly into the chassis. Utilizing quantum-stabilized capacitor banks, it can safely contain extraordinary amounts of electrical energy without the size or weight penalties of conventional batteries. Designed for advanced synthetic operatives, the matrix provides the endurance necessary for extended autonomous deployment.
